steps.label: Bloom
steps.instruction: Pour twice the dose weight in water. Spiral pour from the centre outwards. Swirl the brewer until the mixture is even. Let bloom.

steps.label: First pour
steps.instruction: Pour slowly from centre outwards and then concentrically.

steps.label: Second pour
steps.instruction: Pour concentrically until you reach the total. Give the slurry a gentle swirl.

steps.label: Drawdown
steps.instruction: Wait until the coffee has fully drained.

name: Tetsu Kasuya's 4:6 Method
description: Tetsu Kasuya's 4:6 method. This medium variant uses equal first pours for balanced acidity/sweetness, and two second pours for medium strength.

steps.label: First pour
steps.instruction: Spiral pour from the centre outwards and back to the centre to wet all the coffee. Wait until the water drains.

steps.label: Second pour
steps.instruction: Spiral pour from the centre outwards and back to the centre. Wait until the water drains.

steps.label: Third pour
steps.instruction: Spiral pour from the centre outwards and back to the centre. Wait until the water drains.

steps.label: Fourth pour
steps.instruction: Final pour to reach the total water amount. Wait until the water drains.

steps.label: Drawdown
steps.instruction: Wait until the coffee has fully drained.

steps.label: Pour
steps.instruction: Pour all the water over the grounds.

steps.label: Steep
steps.instruction: Do nothing. Let it sit with the lid off.

steps.label: Break crust
steps.instruction: Break the crust with a plunger, gently. Don't plunge all the way.

steps.label: Plunge & pour
steps.instruction: Press the plunger gently and slowly.
